name: polymath
description: A public, open-source Claude Code marketplace of work-shaped plugins covering the full lifecycle of building software products.

plugins.name: polymath-core
plugins.description: Foundation: conventions, glossary, tone references, plugin-budget reporter, SessionStart hook.

plugins.name: polymath-product
plugins.description: Product craft: PRDs, acceptance criteria, epic decomposition with materialized templates.

plugins.name: polymath-engineering
plugins.description: Engineering craft: TDD feature-dev loop, code review, change verification, codebase orientation.

plugins.name: polymath-release
plugins.description: Release craft: Conventional Commits, PR descriptions, CHANGELOG, release notes.

plugins.name: polymath-flows
plugins.description: flows-lite workflow runner: deterministic serial executor with state, resume, and mustPass checks.
